mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_share WHERE user_id = #{_parameter} AND space_type = 'PERSONAL' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_share WHERE team_id = #{_parameter} AND space_type = 'TEAM' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_share WHERE id = #{shareId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND space_type = 'PERSONAL' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_share WHERE id = #{shareId} AND team_id = #{teamId} AND space_type = 'TEAM' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_share SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{shareId} AND team_id = #{teamId} AND space_type = 'TEAM' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_share SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{_parameter} AND space_type = 'TEAM' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_share SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND creator_account_id = #{accountId} AND space_type = 'TEAM' AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM sys_share s WHERE s.share_token = #{_parameter} AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND ( s.space_type = 'PERSONAL' OR ( s.space_type = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_space ts WHERE ts.id = s.team_id AND ts.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ts.is_deleted = 0 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_member tm WHERE tm.team_id = s.team_id AND tm.account_id = s.creator_account_id AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tm.is_deleted = 0 ) ) ) LIMIT 1
